name: Lomi Lomi Salmon
recipeInstructions:
1. Scoop the tomato insides out with a large melon baller, attempting to keep the outside shell of the tomato as intact as possible. Dice the removed insides and place them in the refrigerator while proceeding with the recipe.
2. Soak the salt salmon after cleaning. Change the soaking water occasionally to drain off most of the salt. After 3 to 5 hours of soaking, remove all of the skin and bones. Cut the salmon into small pieces and place it in a bowl.
3. Add the diced tomatoes and chopped yellow onion to the bowl with the salmon. Cover the mixture with ice cubes until ready to serve.
4. Chop the green onions very finely and place them on top of the tomato mixture, which will be served in the tomato shells. Just before serving, add a little crushed ice to the shells.
